question: Which Asian country is known as the "Land of the Rising Sun"?
funFact: The name Japan (Nihon) translates literally to "origin of the sun."

question: Which famous historical leader founded the Mongol Empire in 1206?
funFact: Genghis Khan created the largest contiguous land empire in history.

question: Which traditional martial art originated in Okinawa, Japan?
funFact: Karate translates to "empty hand" in Japanese, referring to fighting without weapons.
